meta.title: Unsolicited Response S4x19
meta.description: We close down Stage 2 at S4 with Unsolicited Response. Speakers are allowed 5-minutes to talk (rant) about whatever they want. Some are funny. Some are project ideas. Some are blowback on a session they thought was dead wrong. And there is craft beer and root beer served.
